CzD6fazOqTe:
Montenegro, one of the most underrated destinations in Europe 🌍 Share these great photos with your friends

Montenegro is an underestimated Mediterranean paradise filled with hidden treasures 😍✈️

Start your voyage by visiting the mystical island of Our Lady Of The Rocks with its legendary church nestled in the heart of the Bay of Kotor.

Then continue your exploration by admiring the beauty of Tivat Bay, a true gem of the Adriatic coast.

Change the scenery with a trip to Sveti Stefan, a picturesque and luxurious island with breathtaking views of the Adriatic.

Don't miss Lake Piva, a hidden paradise with turquoise waters reflecting the surrounding mountains.

Immerse yourself in history by visiting Perast, the Venice of Montenegro, where the charm of its narrow streets and baroque churches will transport you back in time.

Then marvel at Kotor and the Bay of Kotor, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, offering an unforgettable experience between mountains and sea.

Go on an adventure to explore the Lovcen National Park, a unique place for hiking and discovering Montenegrin flora and fauna.

Finally, end your voyage by contemplating the Kanli Kula fortress in Herceg Novi, a historical site offering a panoramic view of the Adriatic Sea.

Embark on an unforgettable voyage to this country of a thousand wonders! 🇲🇪💖

CstVx6CP_kO:
Q: 關於從東京到富士山夢之大橋，有沒有什麼交通票可以用呢？東京廣域周遊券可以用嗎？
⁡
以上是我最近經常收到的問題，這一篇就來為各位解答❣️若你之後也想去踩點，別忘了存起來供未來參考喔🥰
⁡
然後之前剪的短影片，竟然突破 100 萬觀看了😳很開心被 IG 演算法抓到，也很歡迎因此新加入的朋友，未來也請多多指教啦🥳
⁡
首先先回答東京廣域周遊券能不能使用的問題，簡而言之是不行。根據官方給的地圖，新幹線的利用區間是從東京站往北，所以南邊的靜岡是絕對不適用的。
⁡
那有沒有什麼優惠的交通票可以用呢？我查了很久，好像只有 JR RAIL PASS 日本鐵路通票可以用🥲(如果有人有別的方法，歡迎留言告訴我❣️)
⁡
因此，從東京到富士山夢之大橋最近的新富士站，大致有底下兩個選擇：
⁡
① 不用優惠交通票直接買新幹線
東京站 ⇄ 新富士站 ¥11400/人
⁡
② 利用 JR RAIL PASS 日本鐵路通票
※ 住日本的外國人無法使用
⁡
雖然「目前」日本鐵路通票無法劃「のぞみ」(Nozomi) 跟「みずほ」(Mizuho) 這兩種新幹線，但是距離富士山夢之大橋最近的新富士站，要搭乘「こだま」(Kodama) 新幹線才會到，所以是可以使用的✨
⁡
⚠️2023/10 之後日本鐵路通票大漲價⚠️
相信大家前陣子都有看到這個消息💦不過因為我從來沒用過，所以心比較不痛😂
⁡
這個通票漲價後，前面說無法劃位的新幹線也都可以搭乘了。至於漲幅的部分，這個票有 7 天、14 天、21 天等三種版本，以 7 天的為例：
⁡
【目前】
JR 指定合作代理店售價 ¥29650
專門網站售價 ¥33610
⁡
【2023/10】
會漲為 ¥50000
⁡
⚠️補充⚠️原本有查到一個叫作「ぷらっとこだま」的便宜交通方案，但後來發現它的限制很多，且不適用在「新富士站」下車的狀況，還請大家注意不要購買‼️不然下車還是要補差價的💦
⁡
以上，希望能幫助大家規劃行程💪🏻
⁡
📷 2023.5.3
⁡
⁡
⁡

追蹤我看日本四季風光❞

Cy-vFBSyIuA:
【福岡・久留米　カフェスタンド10.8】
⁡
福岡・久留米にあるカフェスタンド10.8さんは、ふわふわぷるぷるの焼きたてパンケーキが人気のお店！
⁡
今回注文したのは抹茶大福パンケーキ(1000円)🥞🍵
⁡
抹茶ソースを忍ばせた分厚いスフレパンケーキを2枚重ねた上に特製抹茶クリーム、求肥、仕上げにも抹茶をたっぷりふりかけて提供してくれます！
⁡
注文を受けてから1枚1枚丁寧に焼きあげるお店自慢のパンケーキは歯がいらないほどふわふわぷるぷる🥞
⁡
さらに抹茶は福岡のお茶屋さんから仕入れた上質なものを使ってるらしく、本格的な抹茶の香りがクリームの甘さやもちもちの求肥と相まって絶品🤤🤤
⁡
このクオリティーが1000円で食べれるなんて都内じゃほぼあり得ないし、1番シンプルなクラシックパンケーキは600円ととにかくコスパ神。
⁡
店員さんも優しくて美味しかったからまた福岡で食べに行きたいお店のひとつ！
⁡
超おすすめ！
⁡
CAFE STAND 10.8
⁡
One of the fluffiest pancakes in Fukuoka🥞
 
The “Matcha daifuku pancake” is filled with matcha sauce and topped with matcha cream, mochi, and matcha powder🍵
⁡
They use matcha from a famous Japanese tea shop in Fukuoka, slightly bitter and rich in flavor.
⁡
All pancakes are freshly made to order, and you can get a plate of 3 pancakes from 600yen!
⁡
Highly recommended!
⁡
カフェスタンド10.8
𖠿 福岡県久留米市通町107−１３ 高山ビル 1F
⌚︎ 11:00〜18:00,水曜のみ11:00〜17:00
☑︎ 風流な抹茶大福 1000円

CyvItQMMGc6:
Il nostro Ambassador @jakecarson90 è andato per noi nel borgo ospite di Fiorenzuola di Focara, frazione del comune di Pesaro a cui è stato annesso nel 1929.
Il promontorio roccioso di a strapiombo sul Mare Adriatico, nel centro del Parco naturale regionale del Monte San Bartolo, costituisce il confine geografico orientale della Romagna, che trova a fondovalle il suo corrispettvivo orografico nel Valico della Siligata; il borgo si trova amministrativamente nella regione Marche.

È un borgo non solo di pescatori ma anche di selcini, mestiere antico e faticoso, che lavoravano i sassi levigati dal mare per utilizzarli nelle pavimentazioni di strade e di piazze d’Italia.
Dista 9 km dal capoluogo Pesaro, 8 km dalle località balneari di Gabicce Mare e Cattolica e 18 km dalla cittadina di Riccione, nel cuore della riviera romagnola.

Our Ambassador @jakecarson90 visited for us the host borgo of Fiorenzuola di Focara, a hamlet of the municipality of Pesaro to which it was annexed in 1929.
The rocky promontory overhanging the Adriatic Sea, in the centre of the Monte San Bartolo Regional Natural Park, forms the eastern geographic border of Romagna, which finds its orographic counterpart in the Valico della Siligata at the bottom of the valley, even though it is administratively in the Marche region.

It is a village not only of fishermen but also of "selcini", an ancient and tiring trade, who worked the stones smoothed by the sea for use in the paving of streets and squares in Italy.
It is 9 km from the capital Pesaro, 8 km from the seaside resorts of Gabicce Mare and Cattolica, and 18 km from the town of Riccione, in the heart of the Romagna Riviera.

Cy3Au-vymvj:
【自由が丘　大山生煎店】
⁡
自由が丘にある大山生煎店さんは、小籠包が名物のお店！
⁡
今回注文したのは焼き小籠包6個入り(1080円)🥟
⁡
大きな鉄鍋で焼き上げる小籠包は、底カリッとまわりもちもちの皮で肉汁とスープを閉じ込めた特製餡が包んであります！
⁡
ひと口で頬張ればあつあつのスープと旨みたっぷりのジューシー餡が溢れ出てきてめちゃめちゃおいしい🤤🤤🤤
⁡
焼き以外にも生小籠包(蒸し)も同じ値段で注文できてどっちも1個180円とお手頃なのでそれぞれ何個か頼んで食べ比べするのもいいかも！
⁡
店員さんも優しかったし本当に美味しかったから小籠包好きはぜひ行ってみてほしい！
⁡
超おすすめ！
⁡
TAIZAN SHENJENTEN
⁡
Dim sum stand in Tokyo where you can get delicious Xiaolongbao (Chinese soup dumplings)🥟
⁡
Their specialty is the grilled Xiaolongbao which are all freshly made in front of the customers.
⁡
Each one was packed with super hot broth and meat filling🤤
They were closer to fried than grilled, the skin chewy but crisp on the bottom.
⁡
Good taste, good presentation, reasonable price👍🏻
⁡
Highly recommended!
⁡
大山生煎店
𖠿 東京都目黒区自由が丘１丁目４−６ ヒューマンハーバー
⌚︎ 12:00〜20:00,火曜定休
☑︎ 焼き小籠包 6個 1080円
⁡
TAIZAN SHENJENTEN
Jiyugaoka 1-4-6 Meguro city Tokyo Japan

𝗔𝘀𝘀𝗶𝘀𝗶

Situata nella parte centro-orientale dell'Umbria, Assisi è adagiata sulle pendici del Monte Subasio e domina la pianura solcata dai fiumi Topino e Chiascio, affluenti del Tevere.

La città, che ha dato i natali a san Francesco e santa Chiara.

Nella prima foto l’eremo delle Carceri il luogo in cui san Francesco d'Assisi e i suoi seguaci si ritiravano per pregare e meditare. E’ situato a 4 chilometri dalla città.

Negli altri scatti riuscirete a riconoscere la Basilica in alcune diverse prospettive e altri scorci della città.

Porto's breathtaking views will leave you in awe by @carlopes27 !😍🌟

💡 Porto is a coastal city in northwest Portugal known for its stately bridges and port wine production. In the medieval Ribeira (riverside) district, narrow cobbled streets wind past merchants' houses and cafes. São Francisco Church is known for its lavish baroque interior with ornate gilded carvings. The palatial 19th-century Palácio de Bolsa, formerly a stock market, was built to impress potential European investors.

CvmXR5jsujE:
9 wonders of the Dolomites in Italy ✨🏔️ Share these stunning photos with your friends.

1️⃣ #LakeMolveno: Start your adventure at Lake Molveno, an alpine gem surrounded by lush forests and majestic mountains. A perfect place for hikers and water sports enthusiasts.

2️⃣ #LakeBraies: Explore Lake Braies, nicknamed "the pearl of the Dolomites," whose crystal clear waters reflect the surrounding peaks. Don't miss a traditional boat ride for an unforgettable experience.

3️⃣ #ValDiFunes: Immerse yourself in the beauty of the Funes Valley, where steep mountains and green pastures create an idyllic landscape. An ideal destination for hikers and photographers.

4️⃣ #Vipiteno: Stroll through the streets of Vipiteno, a charming medieval town with colorful houses and narrow streets. Discover its rich cultural and architectural heritage.

5️⃣ #GeislerAlm: Rejuvenate at Geisler Alm, a picturesque mountain hut with stunning views of the Dolomite peaks. An ideal place to relax after a long day of hiking.

6️⃣ #SanGenesio: Take in the breathtaking views from San Genesio, a charming village perched on a green plateau. Take advantage of the many opportunities for hiking and outdoor activities.

7️⃣ #GardenaPass: Cross the Gardena Pass, a spectacular mountain pass offering breathtaking views of the surrounding peaks. A must-see for road trip and cycling enthusiasts.

8️⃣ #PuezOdleNaturePark: Discover the Puez-Odle Nature Park, a haven of biodiversity and stunning scenery. Hike through its forests, mountain pastures and impressive rock formations.

9️⃣ #LacBraies: Admire once again the enchanting beauty of Braies Lake, a serene place that perfectly captures the essence of the Dolomites.

What is your favorite photo?

Great photos by @funk_design (1) @michael_nebuloni8819 (2) @ilhan1077 (3) @marina_demse (4) @barboork (5) Luis Reiterer (6) @mikesugianto & @angelaliggs (7) @Tiuiuii (8) @elcampa1969 (9) @brigrc (10)

𝗔𝘂𝘁𝘂𝗻𝗻𝗼 𝗶𝗻 𝗩𝗮𝗹 𝗚𝗮𝗿𝗱𝗲𝗻𝗮

La chiesetta di San Giacomo e’ la chiesa più antica e anche quella più in quota (1536 mt s.l.m.) della Val Gardena in Alto Adige. 

Si trova sopra Ortisei ed e’ raggiungibile solo a piedi con una passeggiata nel bosco di circa un’ora. 

📌 𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗲 𝗮𝗿𝗿𝗶𝘃𝗮𝗿𝗲 

Una volta a Ortisei ( nell’ultima foto) seguendo la strada che porta alla chiesa parrocchiale potrete trovare facilmente un parcheggio coperto a pagamento. Da lì si dirama la “streda Sacun” dove saranno presenti le indicazioni per la chiesetta di San Giacomo.

E’ consacrata al patrono e protettore degli escursionisti e Pellegrini. 

📌𝗜𝗻 𝘀𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗲𝘀𝗶

CyQWtpzru19:
📚 Cafebrería El Péndulo 📚

📍Mexico City, Mexico

Unearth a delightful fusion of culture, literature, and gastronomy at Cafebrería El Péndulo, a unique bookstore-café nestled in the lively heart of Mexico City. This iconic spot, established in 1993, has been drawing locals and tourists alike with its enchanting blend of bookshop, coffeehouse, and bistro, creating an atmosphere that caters to both mind and palate. 🇲🇽

Beyond its extensive collection of Spanish and English books, Cafebrería El Péndulo is renowned for its verdant interiors, where lush plants drape from balconies and cozy nooks invite you to sit and lose yourself in a good read. Amid the aroma of coffee and the rustle of turning pages, live music often fills the air, transforming the space into a dynamic cultural hub. 📖

When you visit Cafebrería El Péndulo, you're embarking on more than a literary adventure. This bookstore-café offers an immersive experience, where the simple act of reading is elevated by the soothing aroma of coffee, the taste of delicious food, and the stimulating vibrancy of Mexican culture. 🌿

CyLXAsYSsK-:
Kyoto Autumn Guide Part 1
京都紅葉ガイド Part1

The best time to see the autumn leaves in Kyoto is usually from mid to late November🍁Today, I'd like to show yox some autumn spots located a little far from the Higashiyama area, the center of Kyoto sightseeing.
京都の紅葉の見頃は、例年11月中旬〜下旬です。今回は、京都観光の中心地、東山地区から少し離れた場所の紅葉をご紹介🍂

1. Ryuonji temple / #龍穏寺
The tunnel of autumn leaves before entering the temple is just amazing.
特に境内に入る前の紅葉のトンネルが素晴らしくきれいです。

2-4. Arashiyama / #嵐山
One of the famous sightseeing spots in Kyoto. Boat tour is also popular.
京都の有名な観光地の一つ。舟下りも人気です。

5-6. Sagano / #嵯峨野
The area is a 20-30 minute walk from Arashiyama. It is fun to walk around the many different shops and restaurants.
嵐山から20-30分歩くと着くエリア。色んなお店が立ち並んでいるので、歩いて回るのも楽しいです。

7-8. Otagi Nenbutsu-ji Temple / #愛宕念仏寺
The temple is a 5-minute walk from Sagano above. The temple are lined with as many as 1,200 stone arhats.
嵯峨野から歩いて5分ほどの場所にあるお寺。境内には1200体もの石の羅漢さんが並んでいます。

9. Jingoji Temple / #神護寺
A long stone staircase leads to the temple. This temple is large, so it is recommended that you wear comfortable shoes🐾 As it is located halfway up the mountain, the best time to see the autumn leaves is from early to mid-November, which is a little earlier than other places.
長い石段を歩いていくと辿り着くお寺。境内も広いので、疲れにくい靴で行くのがオススメです。山の中腹にあるため、紅葉の時期は11月上旬〜中旬が見頃と他の場所より少し早め。

10. Iwato Ochiba Shrine / #岩戸落葉神社
The large ginkgo tree and the yellow carpet created by the ginkgo are beautiful. The shrine itself is small.
大きなイチョウの木と、イチョウが作り出す黄色い絨毯がとで美しい。神社自体は小さいです。

#kyotoguide #autumninkyoto #beautifulautumn #京都紅葉 #京都ガイド #紅葉スポット

Cx2vQl8P4Xb:
In Mekong River Delta, women ride boats to pick water lilies, then wash and sell them at the local market.

Water lilies, which blossom during the rainy or flood season, are used for decoration and cooking ingredient . Their stalks are edible and can be eaten raw with either fermented paste or braised sauce or cooked in sour soups and hotpots.

Along with other aquatic resources, water lilies help locals earn an additional income, especially during the flooding season which peaks annually in October.

CxdYyqRsWSF:
Follow me for more of these travel tips!😊

⬇️Everything you need to know when traveling through Scotland by train🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿🚂

1. Buy a ScotRail travelpass (https://www.scotrail.co.uk/tickets/combined-tickets-travel-passes). They have multiple travelpasses suitable for different parts of the country and for a different amount of days.

2. Plan ahead. The travelpasses give you unlimited travel on a set number of days, so make sure your travel plans align with the amount of days that you can travel with the train pass.

3. The passes are valid on trains, buses and coaches. Just activate the pass each day you want to travel with it and you will receive a QR code for the rest of that day.

4. What route did we take? We bought the Scottish Grand Tour ticket. Giving me 4 days of unlimited travel for 8 consecutive days. We went from Edinburgh to Glasgow. From Glasgow to Fort William. From Fort William to Portree (Isle of Skye) and from Portree all the way back to Edinburgh.

5. Two important tips: the pass in valid only on off-peak hours (which was perfectly fine for us) and the ferry from Mallaig to Armadale (Isle of Skye) is not included.

😍Fun fact: the Scottish Grand Tour pass is valid on the West Highland Line in Scotland (considered one of the most scenic train routes in the world!)🤩

Follow me for more travel tips and experiences!😊

For more questions about the train travel through Scotland, please send me a dm📩

Have you visited Scotland before or planning to do so in the future? Let me know in the comments!🤩⬇️

CxP2z-kvkxf:
富士吉田本町通り、西裏通り Fujiyoshida Honchou Street, Nishiura Street

富士吉田市の昭和レトロな商店街から眺める富士山。
Mt. Fuji seen from the retro shopping street in Fujiyoshida City.

富士吉田は昔から織物の町として知られ機織りの町として栄えてきました。ここには繊維工業が盛んであった昭和の時代に活気があった街並みがタイムスリップしたかのように保存されています。レトロな街並みの向こうに見える雄大な富士山の写真がSNSで話題となり、近年多くの人が訪れるようになりました。

Fujiyoshida has long been known as a textile town and has prospered as a weaving town. Here, the lively townscape of the Showa era, when the textile industry was flourishing, has been preserved as if you have traveled back in time. Photos of the majestic Mt. Fuji visible beyond the retro cityscape have become a hot topic on social media, and many people have started visiting in recent years.

Shot in 2023.2 撮影

Cx2o5RsyiBp:
【大阪・新世界　甘甘堂】
⁡
大阪・新世界にある甘甘堂さんは、超巨大ベビーカステラタワーが名物のお店！
⁡
今回注文したぐらぐら通天閣(600円)は、カプリコの上に焼きたてのベビーカステラを18個も積み上げた高さ50cmのカステラ棒🗼
⁡
黄金色のカステラ生地には高級たまご龍の卵をふんだんに使っているらしく、ほんのり甘くてパクパク食べれちゃうタイプ🤤
⁡
高さ50cmでも最初は意外と安定してたけど、土台のカプリコが溶けてくるとグラグラしてくるので気をつけてね！
⁡
店員さんもすごく気さくで優しかったしこれ持ってると外国人にめっちゃ声かけられてここ最近で1番注目されました🙉
⁡
通天閣からも徒歩5分くらいなので観光がてらにぜひ行ってみて！
⁡
おすすめ！
⁡
KAN KAN DO
⁡
Longest castella bar in Osaka🗼
⁡
KAN KAN DO is a small stand near Tsūtenkaku Tower in Osaka famous for the 50cm high castella tower.
⁡
It’s called “gura gura Tsūtenkaku”, “gura gura” meaning wobbly in Japanese.
⁡
18 freshly baked baby castellas are stacked on top of “Caprico”, a chocolate snack shaped like ice cream🍦 
⁡
The baby castella are made with a special egg which has a bright yellow-orange color called “dragon’s egg”.
⁡
They also had a cheese filled version and evrn
No doubt you’ll be the center of attention if you’re walking around holding this!
⁡
Recommended!
⁡

Cwmc0vpIB1z:
MONTAÑA FANJING - 梵净山
.
Hay quien dice no hay mejor vista del mundo que la que se puede ver desde el Pico Dorado de la Nubes Rojas, también conocido como el Nuevo Pico Dorado. Aquí, situados a 2,336 metros sobre el nivel del mar, se encuentran el Templo de Buda y el Templo de Maitreya. Separados por un barranco, los visitantes pasan de un templo a otro a través de un estrecho puente de piedra.
.
Subir los casi 9.000 escalones que conducen a los templos toma unas cuatro horas, aunque en el camino hay paradas para descansar y comer algo. Otra opción es tomar un teleférico que llega hasta la Piedra de Hongo. Ubicada cerca de la cima del monte Fanjing, esta extraña formación rocosa refleja de la historia milenaria de la zona.
.
Debido a que la montaña Fanjing ha estado relativamente aislada durante tanto tiempo, la zona posee una biodiversidad impresionante. Con picos que van desde los 500 hasta los 2,579 metros sobre el nivel del mar, en este lugar crecen más de 2.000 especies endémicas de plantas y cientos de animales en peligro de extinción, algunas de las cuales datan del Periodo Terciario.
.
.
.

CutSIHxqJwr:
👇 Details

🤩 This hike has really overwhelmed me! A beautiful ridge walk with an all-round view that makes you dreaming. This hike is one of my top hikes that I have done this year. Not only the ridge (called Arnigrat) is the highlight of the hike - also the beautiful nature, which shows itself on the whole trail is to enjoy. The hike is located in the canton of Obwalden in Switzerland.

❗️One thing in advance: the hike is not to be underestimated in terms of altitude and the ridge is marked blue-white (alpine route / T3+ / T4). Please read all the information carefully.

✔️ You should be surefooted, as the grade is narrow. Technically it is not demanding and you do not need any additional equipment. If you don’t have any alpine experience, take a person with you, who already has experience. If you have already done alpine tours, then this one will most likely not be a problem for you.

📍 Starting point is Stöckalp (OW)

🥾 follow the waymarks in the direction of Stepfen, Wandelen and from there follow the alpine hike trail (blue-white) over the arnigrat and then towards flüeli ranft.

➡️ 17 KM ⬆️ 1300 HM ⬇️ 1600 HM 

 ❔If you have any questions, let me know in the comments - I will try to answer all of them.

👉 save this Post for your next hike

#italia @gianfrenk #sardegna
💎 

La #Sardegna è una terra magica soprattutto se osservata dal mare, ed il mare è la sua culla, la culla di un’isola bagnata dall’acqua salata e attraversata da acque dolci.

La Sardegna vive di angeli e demoni, di tradizioni antiche che si rivelano reali con una forza incredibile, di personaggi a metà tra uomini e bestie che incedono lenti e solenni per le strade dei paesi durante le feste popolari. 
La Sardegna è una terra che non può essere distinta dalla sua anima, dal suo passato agro-pastorale e dal suo mare, che qui ha condotto popoli conquistatori in passato e turisti curiosi nel presente. Ma è proprio questo il suo fascino: la Bellezza indiscutibile che la caratterizza unita a ciò che la sua storia porta con sé.

#Sardinia is a magical land especially if observed from the sea, and the sea is its cradle, the cradle of an island bathed in salt water and crossed by fresh water.
Sardinia lives on angels and demons, on ancient traditions that reveal themselves to be real with incredible strength, on characters halfway between men and beasts who incede slowly and solemnly on the streets of the villages during popular festivals.
Sardinia is a land that cannot be distinguished from its soul, its agro-pastoral past and its sea, which here has led conquering peoples in the past and curious tourists into the present. But this is precisely her charm: the indisputable Beauty that characterizes her combined with what her story brings with it.

#ig_italia #italy #sardinia
🎥 @gianfrenk

CwW1vzLIRnD:
La PAGODA FEIHONG- 飞虹塔 está ubicada en el Templo Guangsheng en el condado de Hongtong de la provincia de Shanxi, en el norte de China. 
.
La Pagoda Feihong fue terminada en 1527 durante la dinastía Ming y adornada con azulejos vidriados en 1622.
.
Respecto a las figuras vidriadas que pueblan la Pagoda, se despliega una rica variedad: aparte de aquellas relacionadas con el credo budista, también cobran vida criaturas legendarias extraídas del folclore y la mitología, además de ornamentos auspiciosos que emanan de las tradiciones arraigadas. en esta región.
.
 “琉璃宝塔、天下无双”，这是对飞虹塔最怡当评价。绚丽多彩的琉璃构件，在阳光下熠熠生辉，宛如雨后彩虹，故称飞虹。
.

Cv0ge8bpYHL:
sometimes simple is just bestttt! I always talk about how I prep a higher protein sweet treat to stash in my freezer for the week. This makes grabbing a healthier option super easy, you don’t even have to think about it. & being sure to include healthy fats & protein in your sweet treats, is important in keeping you satiated & balancing blood sugar 🙏 

This cookie dough bark is vegan, requires no baking, & takes like 5 mins to make!

•1/2 cup of your fave protein (i used @macr0mike salted caramel - I have a discount in my bio 🤍)
•1/2 cup oat flour (you can sub almond flour but you may need to use closer to 3/4 cup)
•1/4 cup melted coconut oil
•1/4 cup maple syrup
•1/2 tsp vanilla + pinch of sea salt
•handful of cacao nibs (full of antioxidants! Can also sub choc chips)
•1 cup chocolate chips

Mix together the cookie dough ingredients. Spread onto a lined baking sheet. Melt the chocolate. Pour over top. Sprinkle with sea salt. Place in the freezer for 2-4 hours until completely firm before breaking into pieces. Store in an air right container in the freezer!

#cookiedough #proteincookiedough #highprotein #highproteinsnack #healthysnacks #healthytreats #vegandessert #vegancookiedough #healthysnackideas

PLANAZO GRATIS ✨ súper secreto!! 

Y es que ha estado 20 años cerrado y vuelve a abrir 🥲♥️ qué fantasía!!

Bajo cascadas y una montaña encontramos esta cueva de 1817!! 

La han rehabilitado y ahora en su interior (además de poder recorrer sus tunelcitos) hay una expo con fotos mega antiguas de su origen.

Es pequeñita pero SÚPER CURIOSA de ver 🥰🥰 y al lado tienes los restos de la Iglesia de San Isidoro del siglo XI (otra maravilla de Madrid).

⭐️ Se puede subir a la cúpula, antes habia un templete pero ahora esta ilumina el interior.

⏰ HORARIOS: 11-13 y 18-20h.

CveMV85oE6k:
📍 DONGYANG - 东阳 (Zhejiang - 浙江)
.
La base de la industria de la construcción de Dongyang se encuentra en el tallado en madera, que se originó en la dinastía Tang y se convirtió en un sistema arquitectónico antiguo completo que incluye carpintería grande y pequeña. Debido a su entorno geográfico con tres montañas y dos cuencas, la población es densa y la tierra es limitada, una gran cantidad de personas deambularán y realizarán algunos trabajos de construcción durante su tiempo libre.

Este arte originó en la región de Dongyang durante la dinastía Tang (alrededor de 700 años d.C.) y sigue siendo considerado uno de los más exquisitos del mundo. La región se convirtió en el mayor centro de producción de relieves de madera durante las dinastías Ming (1368-1644) y Qing (1644-1911).
.
Actualmente, algunos talleres en la región de Dongyang, tratan de preservar esta forma de arte y muestran su trabajo tallado en enormes paneles y murales que tienen como destino prestigiosos museos y galerías, también se exhiben en colecciones privadas que buscan inmortalizarlos para que sean siempre parte de su cultura y tradición.
.

Wood you try this? 🪵

@karakimokkou_’s chopstick 🥢 making workshop is a must do activity in the Little Edo district of Kawagoe. Choose from an assortment of woods from all over Japan and around the world. Prices vary depending on the type of wood you choose with each wood being ranked based on hardness. Learn first hand step by step how to shave, sand, and polish your wood into the perfect pair of traditional Japanese chopsticks. The whole activity takes about 30 minutes and there is no need to reserve in advance.

🏷️ Prices vary from ¥1650-4000+

📍  Wood Works Kawagoe (Japan, 〒350-0063 Saitama, Kawagoe, Saiwaicho, １４−3)

CtBpaOnpjmF:
【浅草　寿清庵】
⁡
浅草にある寿清庵さんは、京都の上質な抹茶をふんだんに使った抹茶クレープ専門店！
⁡
今回注文したのは八坂(880円)🍵
⁡
こちらは抹茶ティラミスをイメージしたクレープ！
もちもちの抹茶生地の中に抹茶クリーム、マスカルポーネクリーム、カスタードクリーム、抹茶カステラ、黒豆を巻き入れ、仕上げに抹茶パウダーをたっぷりかけてくれます🤤
⁡
クレープ生地だけでなく、中のクリームにも京都宇治産の上質な抹茶のみを使っているらしく、ひと口目から抹茶の香りやほろ苦さがしっかり感じられます🍵🍵
⁡
さらにミルキーなクリームやカステラ、黒豆の食感もいいアクセントになっていて、ボリュームはありますが最後までおいしくいただけました！
⁡
購入方法は、店頭に置いてある券売機で発券して指定の時間に戻ってくるシステムなのと、人気店のため土日は特に早い時間に行かないと売り切れてる可能性があります⚠️
⁡
2人で1個でちょうどいいぐらいボリュームあるしめちゃくちゃおいしいから抹茶好きは浅草来たらぜひ食べてみてほしい🍵
⁡
超おすすめ！
⁡
KOTOBUKI SEIAN
⁡
Famous matcha crepe in Asakusa Tokyo.
⁡
There are 5 different flavors and all of them use only the finest matcha from Kyoto, Uji.
 
I chose their signature menu, Yasaka a tiramisu matcha crepe.
⁡
Matcha cream, mascarpone cream, castella dipped into matcha syrup, and sugar coated black beans is wrapped inside, and finished off with a generous amount of matcha powder.
⁡
You could taste the richness of matcha from the first bite!
The cream inside was sweet, so the bitter matcha was a good combination!
⁡
It’s super filling, so sharing one with 2 people might be a better choice if you want to try other food too.
⁡
Recommended to all matcha lovers🍵
⁡
寿清庵

【新しい名古屋めし⁈炭火焼きブロック和牛の牛まぶし】

今日、紹介するお店は愛知系の名古屋市中区におる"もうもう亭"

注文したのは"飛騨牛まぶしコース"

上タンや上ハラミを食べた後に、目の前の焼き台でA5ランクの飛騨牛よ塊を店員さんが焼いてくれます！
いい感じに焼けた飛騨牛の塊をカットしてお櫃に盛り付けて、肉まぶしの完成です！(*´ー｀*)

何もつけなくても、噛めば噛むほどお肉の旨味が口の中いっぱいに広がって美味しいですし、出汁をかけてお茶漬けにすればさっぱりして、食べやすくなるのでご飯の量は少し多めでしたけどペロリと食べれちゃいました！(●´ω｀●)

最近は肉まぶしが、名古屋の新しい名物化してると聞いたので、観光名所は名古屋はないですが美味しく変わった名物料理はあるので、県外の方達もぜひ食べてほしいです！(о´∀`о)

Cu6q5VegDV3:
【麻布十番　牛たんけやき】
⁡
麻布十番にある牛たんけやきさんは、ハイクオリティの仙台牛タンをコスパよく食べれるお店！
⁡
1番のおすすめは特選牛たん3種のひつまぶし(3300円)
⁡
こちらはほかほかの麦飯の上に名物の特上たん、上たん、熟成たんの3種類の牛たん200gを敷き詰めた贅沢ひつまぶし！
⁡
①まずはそのまま
②薬味を入れて
③とろろをかけて
④テールスープをかけて
の4通りで楽しめるのもポイント！
⁡
サックリとした食感を残しつつ柔らかい極厚タン、噛めば噛むほど旨味を感じられる熟成牛タンどっちもめちゃくちゃおいしい🤤🤤
⁡
さらに麦ご飯にかかってるサクサク醤油がこれまたおいしすぎてこの醤油だけでごはん2杯は余裕でいけそう🍚
⁡
牛たんそのものを堪能したいひとは超極厚三種盛定食(3300円)がおすすめ🥩
⁡
こちらはサクサク牛たん醤油、塩レモン、牛たん専用の食べるラー油、生わさび、牛たん南蛮味噌がついてきます！
⁡
ラー油と牛たん醤油が個人的に美味しすぎて瓶買いしたいレベル🥹
麦飯おかわり自由なのでタンで1杯、薬味で5杯ぐらいいける！
⁡
ちなみに定食やひつまぶしに使うタンの切り落とし部分をラー油や牛たん醤油に使用しているらしくSDGsに取り組んでる姿勢も素敵！
⁡
女性1人でも入りやすい雰囲気だし、味もコスパも最高だったので牛タン好きはぜひ行ってみてほしい🤤
⁡
超おすすめ！
⁡
GYŪTAN KEYAKI
⁡
One of the best quality Sendai beef tongue lunch for 3000yen🥩
⁡
GYŪTAN KEYAKI in Azabujuban opened today, a restaurant focused on top quality beef tongue.
⁡
My NO.1 recommendation is their “beef tongue hitsumabushi”.
⁡
3 kinds of beef tongue(Premium, upper-grade, aged tongue) is packed on top of rice and served with grated yam, beef tail soup and more condiments.
⁡
Here’s how to enjoy it 4 ways!
① On its own 
② With some green onion and wasabi
③ Pour over the grated yam
④ Scoop the remaining rice and meat into a small bowl and enjoy with beef tail soup
⁡
The perfectly grilled beef tongue is super soft but chewy with a tender-crisp texture🥩
There was a layer of homemade crispy soy sauce between the beef tongue and rice which was dangerously good.
I could eat another whole serving of rice just with the soy sauce🤤🤤
⁡
If you want something more simple, get the “thick cut beef tongue set”.
⁡
An assortment of thickly cut beef tongue comes with 5 condiments - crunchy soy sauce, chili oil, miso, salted lemon paste and fresh wasabi, all made using the excess parts of beef tongue!
⁡
Both menus are 3300yen and they have takeaway bento boxes too🍱
⁡
Highly recommended!
⁡

Cu9gio6MN6N:
📍#italia #puglia 
💙🇮🇹🐠☀️🍷

#Buongiorno ragazzi, la Puglia è una terra meravigliosa con il suo grande patrimonio artistico, culturale e naturale. Sono tanti i gioielli che impreziosiscono questa regione italiana bagnata da due mari, alcuni dei quali sono Patrimonio dell’Umanità Unesco.. Il capoluogo è Bari e le altre provincie sono Brindisi, Foggia, Lecce, Taranto e Barletta-Andria-Trani, quest'ultima istituita nel 2008. Davvero felice è la combinazione delle attrattive che questa terra racchiude, dagli 860 chilometri di costa con scogliere a picco e spiagge caraibiche, a un'enogastronomia di qualità: il pane di Altamura Dop, il capocollo di Martina Franca, le bombette di Cisternino, gli oli extravergine d'oliva e i vini Primitivo, Negroamaro e Nero di Troia sono solo alcune delle eccellenze regionali. Chiese rupestri, cattedrali romaniche, i castelli di Federico II e i tesori del Barocco ne arricchiscono, invece, il profilo artistico. La Puglia sono i trulli, gravine, puli e doline, i Parchi nazionali del Gargano e delle Murge, le riserve marine delle Isole Tremiti e di Torre Guaceto. La Puglia sono le basiliche, cattedrali e santuari, espressioni artistiche diverse accomunate dalla fede, sono i famosi fischietti di terracotta di Rutigliano, i merletti del Gargano, i prodotti ceramici di Grottaglie e i manufatti realizzati nel Salento con la tenera pietra leccese, con il ferro battuto e con la cartapesta. La Puglia sono i ritmi e i colori della Taranta e della pizzica salentina che ricevono il dovuto omaggio nella famosa Notte della Taranta, divenuto ormai il più grande festival d'Italia dedicato a questo ballo tradizionale dalle ancestrali sfumature antropologiche e una delle più significative manifestazioni sulla cultura popolare in Europa.

CsD2Xrruoyt:
鰻丼より鰻を感じる究極の鰻骨100%ラーメン🐟

【飯田橋　山田の鰻】
⁡
飯田橋にある山田の鰻さんは、金土限定で提供している鰻骨ラーメンが話題のお店！
⁡
今回注文したのは鰻骨ラーメンとミニ鰻丼のセット(1800円)🍜🍚
⁡
こちらは完全無投薬で養殖している霧島湧水うなぎの骨、頭、ヒレを使い、企業秘密の手法でつくる鰻骨100%の白湯スープがべースの究極のラーメン！
そこに低加水ストレート細麺を茹で時間わずか20秒で投入します！
⁡
まずは鰻骨100%のスープをひと口啜ってみると、ドロっとした見た目からは想像できないほど上品な味わいにびっくり！！
もちろん臭みなど一切なく、鼻から抜けてくうなぎの濃厚な旨みや香りがたまらない🤤🤤
⁡
鮮度命の麺はパキッとコシがあり、鰻骨スープとも相性抜群。
後半はトッピングの刻みウナギや漬け卵黄、山椒で味変してまた一味違うおいしさが堪能できます！
⁡
セットの丼も釜炊きごはんというこだわり🍚 
釜炊きごはんに鰻骨スープを注いでみるとまるでひつまぶしを食べているような味になりました！
⁡
ふっくら焼き上げた蒲焼きが乗ったミニ鰻丼セットは1800円、白ご飯セットは1300円です🍚
⁡
カウンターのみの落ち着いた雰囲気、目の前で作ってくれるライブ感、そしてなんと言ってもこの味とコスパの良さ、間違いなく今年1番の衝撃でした！
店員さんいわく、13:00過ぎが狙い目みたいです！
⁡
ラーメン好きも鰻好きもぜひ行ってみてほしいお店！
超おすすめ！
⁡
⁡
YAMADA NO UNAGI
⁡
One of the best ramen in Tokyo.
⁡
The unagi ramen(unakotsu ramen) is only served on Fridays and Saturdays. 
⁡
Its broth is made of 100% unagi(eel) bones and fin.
Light on the tongue, but super rich in unagi flavor.
⁡
You can taste more unagi than a lot of the unagi-donburi out there.
⁡
The extra thin ramen noodles are boiled for just 20 seconds, super fresh, perfect texture.
⁡
You can order just the eel ramen for 900yen, with a set of pot-cooked rice(1300yen) or a small unagi donburi(1800yen).
⁡
I recommend having some rice and pouring some of the ramen broth into the rice at the end. It’s amazing🤤
⁡
Highly recommended!!
⁡

CuUtE5QOpoZ:
Two Hours from Calgary - The Icefields Parkway 🏔️ 

This is said to be one of the most scenic highways in the world. This stretch of road connects Banff NP and Jasper NP over 230km. The drive reveals a new view throughout every turn, with towering mountain peaks, ancient glaciers, and blue lakes to stop and stretch your legs. 

Here are three stops I recommend. 

Bow Lake - Right off the highway is this blue alpine lake you can enjoy from the shores or take a canoe and paddle in. 

Mistaya Canyon - A short hike to see the blue water rush through a deep canyon. 

Columbia Icefield - Take a glacier tour and stand on a 10,000-year-old sheet of ice.

There is next to no service on this highway. I recommend downloading your maps for offline use before heading out. 

#BanffNationalpark #JasperNationalPark #Banff #IcefieldParkways

Crc5Eq7INcM:
Have you ever hiked to the highest peak in Romania? The Dragons Window path towards the Moldoveanu Peak is a breathtaking adventure that will make you fall in love with the Carpathian Mountains.

The Moldoveanu Peak, located in the Făgăraș Mountains, stands at an impressive height of 2,544 meters above sea level, making it a popular destination for hikers from all over the world. The Dragons Window path is one of the most scenic routes to reach the summit, offering panoramic views of the surrounding valleys and mountains.

As you can see in this Reel, the path is lined with beautiful flowers and plants, adding to the charm of the hike. The journey towards the top may be challenging, but the stunning natural scenery along the way makes it worth every step. So, are you ready to take on the Dragons Window path towards the Moldoveanu Peak?

Video by @awfullytasty

CppfcsbItlT:
Huevos Mayak 🤯- los huevos más adictivos que he probado

Si te gusta, dale amor al post ❤️ y guarda🔒la receta para prepararlos. Están BRUTALES.

 ⏱️ Marinado antes de consumir: mínimo 1 noche (ideal 24h).

❄️ Aguantan fácil 4 días en nevera (ideal batch cooking).

🔥 Para toque picante, sustituid pimiento verde por jalapeño o otro.

🍃 Podéis añadir el sésamo en el propio marinado, pero yo prefiero hacerlo en el momento de consumir.

♻️ No os recomiendo reciclar el marinado. Pierde sabor y los huevos se os pondrán malos antes. Mejor consumir el marinado cada vez que se preparan.

🥚 Para textura cremosa (como en el vídeo) 6 min de cocción justos (con huevos al natural). Para más cocidos ajustad tiempo, y importante el baño con hielo para detener la cocción y ayudar a pelar.

🫙MARINADO para 6 huevos: 1/2 taza soja, y 1/2 taza agua y miel/agave/azúcar (otros endulzantes ajustad cantidad). Y 2 ajos, y 1 trozo de pimiento verde, rojo y cebollino. 

Enjoy!

#huevosmayak #mayak #mayakeggs #huevoscoreanos #huevosmarinados #huevoscocidos #sofboiledeggs #koreaneggs #huevos #batchcooking #avocadotails
Cq2BeAyO-LS:
🥞 S A V E 🥞 - I waited 5 HOURS for this fluffy pancakes & di sini gak bisa walk in ya, harus ambil tiket dulu mulai jam 8:30 pagi. Aku udah dateng on time aja dapetnya jam setengah dua siang 😂. Ada deposit 1.000 yen/orang, tapi nanti dikembaliin pas bayar.
.
Aku pesen dua pancakes: BACON AND EGGS DAN STRAWBERRY & CREAM. Aku harus akuin tekstur pancakenya heavenly good! It's the best fluffy pancake texture I've had. Lembut tapi masih "kue", gak amis sama sekali & gak terlalu eggy. THE BACON & EGG WAS AMAZING (2.200 yen)! Pake topping marmalade, crispy bacon, telur & Hollandaise sauce. Porsinya gede, sausnya creamy tapi gak eneg, gurihnya menurutku pas. Personally lebih suka ini dari STRAWBERRY & CREAM (2.400 yen).
.
Is it worth the 5-hour tho? YES. Setidaknya masih bisa keliling-keliling dulu, kalau ngantri sih ogah.
.

Less than an hour north of Rome lies Calcata, a medieval village clinging to a volcanic cliff surrounded by the densely-wooded Treja valley. 

With its rugged tufa walls and steep pathways, entering this mystical, car-free hamlet it’s like stepping back in time or falling into a dream where Woodstock meets Hansel and Gretel. ❤️💚🇮🇹

CrctfBCoNY0:
La ciudad antigua de GONGTAN -重庆龚滩古镇, está situado a orillas del río Wujiang, en la municipalidad de Chongqing,. Con una historia de más de 1.800 años, conserva más de 200 construcciones de las Dinastías Ming y Qing.
.
El pueblo cuenta con sus construcciones sobre las montañas y sobre el río. El río, las verdes colinas y el casco antiguo están integrados en uno solo, con la ciudad bajo las montañas, las montañas en el agua y el agua al borde de la ciudad, todo ello entrelazado.
.
Las viejas calles silenciosas de piedra, las singulares torres de pies colgantes y los profundos callejones huelen a encanto antiguo, como una pintura de un paisaje natural.
.
El antiguo pueblo Gongtan es una atracción turística nacional de nivel AAAA y un famoso destino turístico de Chongqing, conocido como "el punto escénico central y la perla brillante de la galería del río Wujiang".
,.
重庆：有一种浪漫，叫龚滩
虽然真正的龚滩已经淹没在乌江之下，但是龚滩古镇绝对是重庆最值得去的古镇
.

ClwxDiZMmCD:
#palermo #italia
💙

Palermo è una città che entra nel cuore e non si dimentica mai: per i colori del suo folklore, l’allegria e la bontà del suo cibo, le rinomate bellezze architettoniche. Potremmo girare per ore a Palermo, senza stancarci mai, ma scoprendo sempre nuovi vicoli ed infinite cose da vedere e rivedere. Ma la cosa che piace e affascina di più ogni anno centinaia di turisti e curiosi sono anche l’atmosfera e la dimensione di una città antichissima, sospesa tra personaggi leggendari, curiosità, miti e leggende.

Passeggiando per il Capo, meta turistica per la sua splendida chiesa dell’Immacolata Concezione, oltre che per il rinomato mercato, notiamo una nicchia sulla facciata della chiesa dei SS. Quaranta Martiri alla Guilla, il cui simbolo sacro è una statuetta della Madonna, donazione di un laboratorio artistico. La Madonnina ha insita una sua specifica particolarità che unisce il “sacro ed il profano”: è stata realizzata fondendo ben 3.000 monete di centesimi di euro. La piccola statua ha preso il posto della corrispettiva effige in plastica. Il messaggio? Sicuramente quello di voler essere uno stimolo ad utilizzare e a vedere il lato utile e “buono” persino del denaro, simbolo materialistico per eccellenza.

Palermo is a city that enters the heart and never forgets itself: for the colors of its folklore, the joy and goodness of its food, the renowned architectural beauties. We could go around Palermo for hours, without ever getting tired, but always discovering new alleys and endless things to see and see again. But the thing that likes and fascinates hundreds of tourists and curious people the most every year is also the atmosphere and size of an ancient city, suspended between legendary characters, curiosities, myths and legends.

CoFZn3IoLxk:
📍Achadas da Cruz, Madeira, Portugal 🇵🇹 

Teleférico das Achadas da Cruz can take you down from a huge cliff to an incredibly unique spot on Madeira, which is the traditional village of Fajá da Quebrada Nova. 

Nestled away on the north-western coast of Madeira, the small parish was once home to hundreds who tended to their livestock and agriculture. Today, many of the small, traditional homes have been unoccupied for years. 

Share with friends and bookmark. Don’t miss this unique spot exploring Madeira. 

Visit it just before the sunset for the best pictures in your Instagram 😉

CplmG3LApLj:
Can’t believe I’m here! 3,000kms ahead of me; from the southern tip to the northern tip of New Zealand. Going to be a wild ride and I can’t wait to get started. Day 1 was flat and fast, with way too much road walking. There were some nice trails scattered throughout but looking forward to better trails as I get further north. I left Bluff at sunrise and made it to Invercargill for a feed and resupply before trekking further to Beach Road Holiday Park - a great little camping spot with very friendly owners! Onto the beach tomorrow!

Day 1: 46.8km, 500m elevation gain 
Total: 46.8km, 500m elevation gain

Ckydd1YIhCp:
È considerato uno dei borghi più suggestivi d’Italia e si trova in provincia di Viterbo, in cima ad uno sperone di tufo in continua erosione alto oltre 400 metri.

Si tratta di Civita di Bagnoregio, soprannominata “La città che muore” dallo scrittore Bonaventura Tecchi, singolare appellativo che mantiene ancora oggi. Il suo lento sgretolarsi era evidente già dalle origini, in epoca etrusca. Come i suoi fondatori, anche i romani si trovarono a dover fronteggiare frane e deterioramento costante a causa delle intemperie e della fragilità del tufo.

Dopo essere diventato quasi un borgo fantasma (un tempo i residenti ufficiali erano appena 15!) oggi resiste e si sta ripopolando grazie a continue opere di manutenzione. Il turismo è in continua crescita, visitatori da tutto il mondo attraversano l’alto ponte di cemento che attualmente rappresenta l’unica via d’ingresso.

INFO UTILI PER LA VISITA: L’auto va parcheggiata in città, nel comune di Bagnoregio. Per raggiungere il borgo potete usufruire del servizio navetta che per pochi euro vi farà risparmiare circa 1 Km di cammino in salita. Arriverete in uno spiazzale dove poter scattare la prima foto panoramica: per me rimane l’angolazione più suggestiva! Per accedere al borgo è prevista una tassa di 5€ (utile al comune per sostenere i lavori di manutenzione costante). Col biglietto alla mano potrete percorrere il ponte lungo circa 300 mt da cui si gode di una vista fantastica sulla Valle dei Calanchi e sui “ponticelli”, bianche creste di argilla che spiccano tra la vegetazione. Alla fine del ponte c’è un’ultima salita, un po’ faticosa, che conduce a Porta Santa Maria, l’unico ingresso per visitare questo delizioso borgo fermo nel tempo.

CnPr6lYjkD0:
& here’s why 👇🏼

Mykonos - 6/10 🏝 It’s pretty but not very authentic, and it DRAINED my bank account 😭 but we had some of the most fun days there - great for beach clubs and nightlife 

Milos - 100000/10 🏝 My favourite Greek island by far. The water is amazing + we stayed in the most incredible Airbnb that lead directly onto the beach. Would go back in a heartbeat 

Paros - 9/10 🏝 My second favourite island, it’s a cheaper, prettier Mykonos. Great restaurants + bars and we loved exploring Lefkes. Plus we stayed in a great hotel where they made the BEST mojitos 

Santorini - 7/10 🏝 Only visited for the day so I feel like I can’t judge it as fairly as the others but we loved what we saw of it. So so pretty. It wasn’t that busy when we went so I might say differently if I went again. Also very £££

Syros - 8/10 🏝 Loved this island - super authentic and laid back. Had a really great experience hanging out with our Airbnb host and his friends. We had some really good meals here too.

Naxos - 6.5/10 🏝 I didn’t like it as much as the other islands BUT we had some amazing meals and went to some really good bars

Rhodes - 9/10 🏝 So unexpected but we LOVED it. Booked a very last minute trip in October with my friend and had the best time. Some of the most beautiful beach clubs (which were affordable too) and a really good night out. Also loved Lindos

CnHp9m2qYtI:
Dolomites travel guide ⬇️

Here’s a 5 day itinerary if you’re planning a trip to the Dolomites region of Italy! 

Day one: Sass de Putia hike of around 4 hours, not very touristic and the food stops are incredible, best polenta of my life here. Afterwards a visit to Santa Maddalena and the church of San Giovanni, plenty of car parks to access the church, there will be lots of tourists here so be warned! 

Day two: The Tre Cime di Lavaredo hike, with an offshoot to the Cadini di Misurina viewpoint. Including the offshoot takes around 4-5 hours but is so worth doing the extra bit, one of my favourite views of the dolomites! 

Day three: Lago di Braies in the morning, rent a boat first thing as there won’t be too many people and afterwards complete the loop of the lake in around an hour. In the afternoon have lunch and a stroll around San Vigilio di Marebbe (this is where we stayed).

Day Four: Nuvolau hike, a beautiful circular loop with one of the most scenic lunch stops at the top. Takes around 4-5 hours with a reasonable ascent to the top. 

Day Five: Seceda hike, my favourite of the whole trip! Amazing panoramic views wherever you look. Cable car up to the starting point and then it’s a 3-4 hour loop. 

🏡 Where to stay: 
San Vigilio di Marebbe is really central to most of the places on this list and is a beautiful little village. I’d highly recommend staying at Residence Rautal as they have a beautiful spa you can use for free and it’s really quite cheap compared to a lot of places in the area. 

✈️ How to get there: 
We flew into Venice airport and rented a car, it’s around a 3 hour drive to the hotel and came with the added benefit of being able to spend a day in Venice on the way home.

❄️🏮 Escena de nieve en el Templo Faxi - 法喜寺雪景
.
La colina de Tianzhu - 天竺山, cerca del área escénica del Lago del Oeste de Hangzhou, es famosa por tres templos antiguos, que los ciudadanos locales llaman los Tres Templos de Tianzhu - 天竺三寺 En la dinastía Qing, el emperador Qianlong los puso nombre: Templo Faxi - 法喜寺, Templo Fajing - 法净寺 y Templo Fajing - 法镜寺.
.
El TEMPLO FAXI es el más nuevo, con más de 1.000 años de historia. Accesible por un pequeño callejón de montaña, Faxi es un destino perfecto fuera de los caminos trillados para aquellos que quieren experimentar un poco de tranquilidad budista sin las multitudes.
.

CnB8A8CIRdv:
HIGH PROTEIN CHICKEN GYROS! 🌯
82g Protein 🤯💪🏼

(Total Macros)
572 Calories
48gC | 4gF | 82gP

Ingredients 👇🏼 (chicken, marinade & toppings)
- 180g Thinly Cut Chicken Breast (raw weight) (Brand: Macrofoods Skinless Chicken Breast)
- 100g Low Fat Greek Yoghurt (Brand: YoPro)
- Squeeze Of Lemon Juice
- Salt, Cumin, Smoked Paprika, Coriander Powder, Pepper (or whichever seasonings you have available)
- 5g Minced Garlic
- 1/2 Sliced Tomato
- 20g Sliced Red Onion
- Fresh Parsley (optional topping)

Tzatziki Sauce 👇🏼
- 75g Low Fat Greek Yoghurt
- 5g Minced Garlic
- Dill & Salt
- Freshly Grated Cucumber
- Squeeze Of Lemon Juice

Garlic Flatbread 👇🏼
- 60g Self Raising Flour (Brand: Vetta Smart Protein Self Raising Flour - or you can use plain flour mixed with 1 Tsp of baking powder & salt)
- 75g Low Fat Greek Yoghurt 
- Parsley Flakes (optional topping)

If cooking the chicken with the exact method I have in the video bake it in the oven at 220 Degrees Celsius for 20 - 25 Minutes.
OR
To keep it simple you can just cook it regularly on a pan, in the oven, air fryer etc. 

IMPORTANT NOTES 👇🏼
- You can either cook the chicken on a pan, grill, in the oven, air fryer or whichever way you prefer & is easiest. The method I did was placing 2 wooden skewers on a half cut onion then stacking the chicken on top.
- Depending on the brand of yoghurt different ones contain more/ less moisture which can cause the dough to be sticky. If this happens slowly add more flour until you have a consistent you can work with.
- When rolling the dough out make sure to lightly flour your surface beforehand to avoid sticking.
- You don’t have to make the flatbread & can use any store bought one if you like but fresh is always best!

Macros are based on the specific brands of ingredients I used listed above. Brands & certain ingredients can be substituted to your own liking if needed, Macros may vary if you chose to do so.

Cmj8RsFrryH:
Villa Cetinale, Siena 🇮🇹 read more below 👇 

 @matteocoltro_weddings via @weddingsintuscany @chinoiserieandchintz @melissa_penfold 

Villa Cetinale is a 17th-century Baroque villa and Italian garden in Tuscany. The property is located in the hamlet of Cetinale near Sovicille, about 12 kilometres (7.5 mi) west of Siena, in Tuscany, Italy. The property is best known for the expansive gardens, arrayed in classic symmetry, as well as for its woodland gardens.

Described by @archdigest as ‘The most beautiful villa in Tuscany’, Cetinale is an architectural marvel with a world famous garden, its own chapel, hermitage, and holy wood. The park contains seven votive chapels, sixteen full length statues and 29 busts, as well as many stone animals and monsters. What makes it unique however, is that it has been a centre for horse racing, hunting, sacred pilgrimages, and lavish entertaining; a combination that can be found nowhere else.

Villa Cetinale is a grand, yet unpretentious Tuscan country villa built in the Roman Baroque style. Surrounded by beautiful gardens and a holy wood known as the Thebaid, it is overlooked by a hermitage known as the Romitorio, which was once inhabited by monks, and forms the northern end of a long straight line that bisects the villa before reaching a monumental statue of Hercules at the southern end of the estate. 

The villa in its present form was completed in 1680 by Cardinal Flavio Chigi (1631-1693), who inherited it from his Uncle, Fabio Chigi, who became Pope Alexander VII in 1655. Cetinale lies some 10 kms to the west of Siena on the edge of a large expanse of wooded hills, known as the Montagnola Senese, a largely untamed region historically inhabited by bandits. The bandits have long since moved on and the remaining tenants are wild boar, deer, foxes, badgers, hares, porcupines, hedgehogs and squirrels, as well as a wide range of migratory birds and wild mushrooms.

.
📍 Templo taoísta en el monte Laojun, Luoyang (Henan) -道教圣地老君山之老君庙
.
A 150 kilómetros al suroeste de la ciudad de Luoyang se encuentra éste que es uno de los destinos turísticos más populares de Henan.
Esta montaña es conocida por su patrimonio cultural taoísta y lugar final de descanso de Laozi o Lao-Tse (604-531 A. C.), el gran filósofo chino fundador del taoísmo. En la cima de la motaña se encuentra el Templo de Laojun, rodeado por tres pabellones.
.
🏃🏃🏃 自驾的可以把车开到索道门口，停车10元一次不限时长 第一级索道费用130元一人，第二级上下一共80元 下山索道关闭时间是晚上6：30，实际上会晚一点，因为有很多人在上面看夜景不愿意走[萌萌哒R] 建议两个都坐，因为从第二级索道到之间，有十里画廊风景很美，走到金顶还需要走两个小时左右 而且现在天气比较冷，储存体力去金顶拍照 越往上风景越美。
.

CljFjE0P8CC:
Koh Panyee is a small island in Phang Nga province. There are about 1,600 people from 360 families who live permanently on the island. All of them are the descendants, directly or indirectly, of Toh Baboo and his family and friends, who were the first people to settle on Koh Panyee some 200 years ago.

Toh Baboo and 2 other families left their homeland in Indonesia by boat looking for a new place to live. They made a vow to each other that if 1 of them found a place where there were lots of fish and where everyone could live, they would signal the others by raising a flag on a mountain as high as possible, so that the others could see it and join them. Toh Baboo discovered the island with its abundance of fish and, true to his promise, raised a flag atop its soaring cliff. That's how the island got the name, Koh Panyee (also written as Ko Panyi) - the Island of the Flag.
.

CkVIgG8I8Xt:
QIANTONG - 前童古镇
.
Situado a 14 km al suroeste del corazón de Ninghai, el casco antiguo de Qiantong es uno de los mejor conservados de la provincia de Zhejiang y un excelente ejemplo de la antigua "cultura confuciana".
.
Qiantong se estableció en la dinastía Song, se hizo famosa en la Ming, y hasta el día de hoy preserva más de 1.300 ejemplos de viviendas antiguas de esa época. Hay unos 2.000 hogares de familias residentes y la mayoría de ellas (80%) tienen el apellido 'Tong',
.
Casi todos los residentes han mantenido el estilo dinástico Ming y Qing original en sus hogares, incluidos los largos letreros de madera que cuelgan de los aleros. Cerca del casco antiguo se encuentra un distrito repleto de obras de artistas antiguos; lugar donde los edificios también se han conservado en su aspecto original. 
.
Sobre la Puerta Liangfang hay tallas exquisitas que muestran las habilidades de antaño, con esculturas de salmones saltando, cabezas de caballos y flores ornamentales. En el santuario,  el Salón ancestral con ático imperial tiene el nombre de la familia Tong, construido a principios de la dinastía Ming y diseñado por Fang Xiaoru.
.
Qiantong no es un punto que esté resaltado en el mapa turístico,  por lo que es muy tranquilo y vale la pena visitarlo.
.
地址：浙江省宁波市宁海县前童镇前童村
.

ClJgABaqnG2:
🔘Borgund Stave Church🔘

•It is a former parish church located in the village of Borgund in Vestland county, Norway.

•It was the church for the Lærdal parish until 1868 when it was closed and turned into a museum.
•In the same year A new Borgund Church was built right next to the old church.

•The brown, wooden church was built sometime between 1180 and 1250 AD with later additions and restorations.

•Its walls are formed by vertical wooden boards, or staves, hence the name "stave church.

•The church has a foundry with a bell from the Middle Ages, built in the middle of the 13th century, which is the only remaining free-standing bell tower in work in Norway today.

このコースは午前の部、夜の部の両方をご用意しました。どちらも違った魅力があるコースです。ぜひご参加下さい！

スケジュールが合わないという方には、2名以上のグループ向けにプライベートでもフォトウォークを開催していますので、ご希望の日程やコースをDMにてご連絡ください。   撮影方法や構図の作り方などのアドバイスもさせていただきます。カメラを買ったばかりの初心者の方やスマホしか持っていない方でも遠慮なくご参加ください😁

フォトウォークのお申し込み・お問い合わせはDMにてお願いいたします。

CkB5BwpD40U:
La Baita Segantini è una magnifica baita di montagna situata a 2291 metri di quota ai piedi delle Pale di San Martino. Vicino alla baita si trova un piccolo laghetto dove si specchiano le vette delle Pale di San Martino

E’ stata la residenza del pittore Segantini da cui la baita prende il nome. Il noto pittore ha passato parte della propria vita vivendo durante tutto il tempo dell’anno in questo posto, sia durante l’estate sia duranti i lunghi e rigidi inverni ai piedi delle Pale di San Martino.

Ora la Baita Segantini è un rifugio ristorante di montagna meta di tanti escursionisti e di tanti fotografi che salgono per fotografare il magnifico panorama offerto da questo punto ai piedi delle Pale di San Martino. Cep-0froQ7U:
Buon weekend da un posto magico al confine tra il Trentino e l'Altoadige! Numerosi sono i sentieri che portano quassù: dall'Alpe di Siusi, dai Bagni di Lavina Bianca, dal Gardeccia e da Campitello di Fassa. 
Partendo da quest'ultimo paesino si arriva al rifugio Micheluzzi.
Lasciato il rifugio ci si incammina su terreno pianeggiante per la lunghissima val Duron, su lussureggianti prati erbosi, una valle un po' sperduta, quasi fuori dal tempo, ma affascinante, stretta a sud dalle cime del Catinaccio d'Antermoia e a nord da quelle del Sassolungo. Frequentemente ci si imbatte negli yak che pascolano allegramente ai lati della nostra strada, 
oltre a mucche, capre e cavalli. Presso malga Docoldaura la strada sale e si entra in un vallone e si sale al Passo Duron, su sentiero su prati, lasciando a destra la deviazione per il rifugio Sassopiatto. 
Dal Passo Duron finalmente si ammira un bel panorama verso la val Duron, l'Alpe di Siusi e il gruppo del Sassolungo. 
Da qua, proprio sotto i magnifici Denti di Terrarossa vi consigliamo di fare un ultimo sforzo per riposarsi e rifocillarsi al Rifugio all'Alpe di Tires, posto che fa da spartiacque 
tra Catinaccio e l'Alpe di Siusi! Ringraziamo il bravissimo Luca @lucacirulli per la meravigliosa foto!  Seguiteci anche sulle altre due nostre gallerie @trentinodascoprire @altoadigedascoprire e @sudtiroldascoprire dedicate esclusivamente all'Altoadige-Südtirol! #trentino #valdifassa #italiait #catinaccio #rosengarten #visittrentino #altoadige #southtyrol #sudtirol #dolomiti #unesco #südtirol #visitsouthtyrol #instatrentino #ilikeitaly #trekking #ig_altoadige #yallersitalia #top_italia_photo #ok_europe #igworldclub #ig_worldclub #italia #mountains #italy #trentinoaltodige #ig_italia #ig_italy #altoadigedascoprire #trentinodascoprire

Ci siete mai stati?

CasV-rQL_Fv:
🔘The Castle of Coca🔘
⚫It is a castle located in the Coca municipality, central Spain.

⚫The castle was constructed in the 15th century and has been considered to be one of the best examples of Spanish Mudejar brickwork which incorporates Moorish Muslim design and construction with Gothic architecture.

⚫The double walls are 2.5 m thick and it's circled by a deep dry moat.

⚫It's made up of two square baileys separated by a passageway.

⚫Both show polygonal towers at the corners.
Due to its great splendour, it was used more as a palace than as a fortress.

👉 Follow me @ancient.scientist to enjoy more and more posts about our world's marvellous History.😉

CaMqNLoDbsd:
The Fairytale ❤️

When I woke up yesterday I took a look outside the window and saw that everything was white white white and it was still snowing so much. 😍

Everything was so beautiful. 

At first I did not want to go out, because its way too early in the morning, I am tired and comfortable on the couch haha, but then I thought to myself: you will regret it of you don’t, because this may very well be the last time it snows this much until the next winter. 

Put on your clothes, take the camera, get in the car and head to town! And I was on my way😀

Once I arrived and saw this view, I was completely amazed. The only thing I thought was: Im so glad I came. This is way too beautiful to miss. Then I moved on to lots of other beautiful places that I will share within the days with you guys! 

Anteaters hope you guys like this one and let me know in the comment what you think of it.

CYGh_OUtqfo:
#italia #trentinoaltoadige

#Buongiorno ragazzi, il Trentino Alto Adige  è un territorio di straordinaria bellezza e biodiversità nel cuore delle Dolomiti, patrimonio UNESCO, un’area in equilibrio tra le tradizioni italiane e passato austro-ungarico, una meta turistica tra le più amate, visitata ogni anno da quasi 6 milioni di turisti, un polo attrattivo per le imprese e l’innovazione, una comunità dove la qualità della vita è tra le più alte in Italia e in Europa
Ricca di tradizioni e di contrasti è una terra da vivere con tutti i sensi che non vi deluderà. È il luogo ideale per chi ama lo sport, per chi vuole immergersi in tradizioni antiche e autentiche, per chi cerca una vacanza indimenticabile per tutta la famiglia o per chi vuole ricaricare le energie circondato da una bellissima e incontaminata natura. Il Trentino Alto Adige attende gli amanti della buona cucina e del buon vino, chi ama l’arte e la cultura, chi vuole ancora meravigliarsi davanti allo spettacolo della natura, in tutte le stagioni dell’anno.

Trentino Alto Adige is a territory of extraordinary beauty and biodiversity in the heart of the Dolomites, a UNESCO heritage site, an area in balance between Italian traditions and the Austro-Hungarian past, one of the most popular tourist destinations, visited every year by almost 6 million tourists, an attractive hub for business and innovation, a community where the quality of life is among the highest in Italy and Europe.

CUm8Pvgr9in:
Though there's not a bad season to visit Italy, autumn is a favorite time of year for many travelers. Temperatures are mild, and crowds have mostly thinned out from their summer peak. Airfare prices tend to drop during this period as do hotel rates, meaning your money might buy you a nicer room in the fall than it would in the summer. In October and especially in November, you're more likely to encounter wet weather, so keep this in mind if you don't like sightseeing under grey, often rainy skies.

Autumn is also a glorious period for eating and drinking in Italy, with opportunities to taste freshly pressed olive oil, precious white truffles, and delicate porcini mushrooms. Restaurant menus often change for the fall, meaning you'll be able to dig into lots of hardy comfort foods like pasta al forno (lasagna), polenta with ragu or mushroom sauce, ribollita (the thick vegetable soup of Tuscany), and other rich pasta and meat dishes. There's also a full festival calendar in autumn, with many events dedicated to the culinary specialties of the season.

CUj47R9rdqC:
Star Gazing in Norway

Aurvandil is a figure in Germanic mythology. In Norse mythology, Aurvandil's toe, which had frozen while he was carried in a basket across the Élivágar rivers by Thor, was made into a star by the thunder-god. Here's a quick guide to the constellations you can see in Norway and north of the Arctic circle.

The 12 constellations of the zodiac are Aries, Taurus, Gemini, Cancer, Leo, Virgo, Libra, Scorpius, Sagittarius, Capricornus, Aquarius, and Pisces. All of these, as well as the full circle of the zodiac, are easily visible in present-day star maps among many other constellations. The largest constellations in the sky are Hydra, Virgo, Ursa Major, Cetus, and Hercules.

When it comes to Arctic stargazing, winter is the absolute best time of year to visit Norway! According to the European Southern Observatory, stable winter weather patterns combined with the dark sky and low light pollution create prime astronomy viewing conditions.

CUFrw3wLSCc:
Iceland is often called the Land of Ice and Fire, a land where volcanoes and geothermal heat have made their mark on the landscape, along with the many glaciers and glacier lagoons, a land of pristine and unspoiled nature. 

Iceland, the lonely island in the middle of the North Atlantic, has become a popular spot for Hollywood blockbuster films. And no wonder, the alien and strange landscapes seems easy to translate as either other planets, as in Star Wars – Rogue One or Prometheus, or suits as a setting for different fantasies, such as Game of Thrones. A land which the powerful elements, fire and ice, have molded and made their mark upon.

Iceland has many attractions and if you have the time, you encourage you to visit as many places as you can, once in Iceland. Nearly everywhere you go, you’ll see beautiful unspoiled nature, low but rugged mountains, volcanoes and lavafields, narrow fjords, viking horses and small picturesque villages. Whether you are in the Snaefellsness peninsula, the Westfjords, traveling south of Vatnajokull glacier, you’ll find breathtaking vistas and landscape like no other.

In spite of everything, France remains the world's number one tourist destination, and by and large it remains one of the safer places in the world to visit. it's not hard to understand why. France has it all - or more or less. It has tourist sights for all tastes; it has some of the greatest beaches in Europe, as well as the highest mountains and the finest historic monuments, the most beautiful cities, the most idyllic countryside, the most magnificent castles, the finest rivers, and plenty more, not to mention some of the best restaurants and the finest wines and more hotels than any other country in Europe.

France has something for everyone, which is one of the reasons why it remains the world's number one tourist destination. It has magnificent holiday opportunities for everything from a short weekend city break, in places such as Paris, Nice or Bordeaux, to a relaxed family holiday in a gite in the countryside, a week or two's relaxation by the seaside, or an energetic break hiking, climbing, kayaking or cycling in France's great outdoors.

Landscapes in Indonesia range from dense tropical forests, home to millions of species to sprawling fertile basins of rice fields. The list continues from massive volcanoes to picturesque beaches, from sky-scraping mountain peaks to extensive dry grasslands. Indonesia boasts of sheltering various endangered animals as well as rafflesia - the largest flower in the world.

The Sunda Islands can be categorized into two parts - Greater Sunda Islands and the Lesser Sunda Islands. Greater Sunda Islands consist of Java, Sumatra, Borneo and Sulawesi, whereas the Lesser Sunda Islands consist of a chain of islands located in the east of Bali. There are other groups of islands also that provide different landscapes after a few kilometers only.

CT7c6ScKe26:
🔘The Hanging Temple🔘
⚫Located in Datong City, Shanxi Province, China.
⚫The Hanging Temple is one of the main tourist attractions and historical sites in the Datong area.
⚫According to legend, construction of the temple started at the end of the Northern Wei dynasty (386-534) AD by only one man, a monk named Liaoran and was restored in the 1900th.
⚫The entire 40 halls and pavilions are all built on cliffs which are over 30 metres (98 ft) from the ground.
⚫Interestingly, the temple is dedicated to not just one religion, but three, with Confucianism, Taoism, and Buddhism all practised within the temple and represented in 78 statues and carvings throughout the temple.

CT2SUSiK8Nf:
🔘The Longmen Grottoes🔘
⚫located south of present-day Luoyang in Henan province, China.
⚫In total, there is more than 2,300 grottoes and niches, 100,000 Buddhist statues, ranging in size from several centimetres to over 17 meters, and over 2,800 inscriptions carved on steles in the site, making it the largest such complex in China.
⚫They are some of the finest examples of Chinese Buddhist art.
⚫The grottoes or caves were excavated and carved with Buddhist subjects over the period from 493 AD to 1127 AD.
⚫The earliest history of the creation of Longmen Grottoes is traced to the reign of Emperor Xiaowen of Northern Wei dynasty.

CTht6ZklDml:
The California Sierras are my most visited destination, period. I can’t get enough of the mountains, lakes, and hot springs. To me, it’s like going to an amusement park. On this particular trip is was fairly cold 🥶 It was around 18°F (-7.7°C) but that didn’t discourage us from getting out there and taking that fresh mountain air. 

It just breaks my heart because for the better part of these last 2 summers this region has been covered in smoke and wildfires. So I’ve been hesitant to visit. According to the NPS “Nearly 85 percent* of wildland fires in the United States are caused by humans. Human-caused fires result from campfires left unattended, the burning of debris, equipment use and malfunctions, negligently discarded cigarettes, and intentional acts of arson.” It’s important to take care of ours lands so that future generations can enjoy these sights as well

CPqcR9KFWZ3:
Saying 'yes' to more opportunities to discover new frontiers! With @k.marksthespot / "Having come back to Montana as a Covid-19 refugee, I found myself on an overnight adventure in Glacier National Park last summer with my dad, an outdoor enthusiast and photographer himself. We arrived during golden hour, hiked up to a lake overlook in time to shoot sunset, then stayed for blue hour and, finally, for the milky way to rise. My love of the outdoors and of photography definitely stems from my dad. Almost all of my childhood memories are of camping trips or hiking in the mountains in Northern Idaho where I was born and then in Northwest Montana when we moved there in 2000.

I am from the Mission Valley and the mountains tower so epically over the valley that it takes my breath away every day. This valley is also part of the Flathead Indian Reservation, which is made up of three tribes, and home to the largest freshwater lake west of the Mississippi river - Flathead Lake. With such beautiful natural wonders all around me in this part of Montana, it is no wonder that most of my photography centers on local spots in this valley. Passing the pandemic here has definitely set me on a new path with regards to my photography. And being able to share my photography passion with my dad and have someone to explore and find new photography spots with was amazing.

Although I have been fortunate to travel quite extensively, I would still tell my younger self to do it even more. It is the greatest school in life and helps to expand your mindset, be flexible and adaptable. Say yes to more opportunities - whether that is to go on more hikes, to travel to new places, to meet new people... just say yes more often!

Being an introvert, I’d also tell my younger self more to put effort into finding friends that share my interests. Finding others to share the passion for photography with has been a real game changer. Photography gives me a way to immortalize these moments that take my breath away, and being able to share this with others, hopefully inspiring them, makes it even better." 🎇 You can read @k.marksthespot's original story by visiting the link in the bio!

COQ-j3Is_kE:
Tintagel Castle ❤ Cornwall UK 
Congrats @sophies.snapshot
The History of Tintagel Castle

A land of Cornish kings

Perched on the north Cornwall coast, Tintagel Castle is one of the most spectacular historic sites in Britain. Its association with King Arthur also makes it one of the most famous.
Yet the history of this enigmatic place stretches back centuries before the fabled king. Journey back 1500 years and Tintagel was a bustling stronghold and trading post, bigger than London at the time. In the 5th to 7th centuries AD, over a hundred buildings sprawled across the island (the ruins of many can be seen today), and its residents enjoyed luxury goods imported from the Mediterranean.
Here on the salt-sprayed clifftops, the people of Tintagel built substantial stone buildings, used fine table wares and feasted on pork, fish, oysters and wine. Experts believe that it was the royal centre of the kingdom of ‘Dumnonia’, a residence of the early Cornish kings.

Where history meets legend

It’s easy to imagine why the clifftop fortress inspired tales of King Arthur. It was Geoffrey of Monmouth who first described the connection, writing his History of the Kings of Britain in the 12th century.
A mixture of fact and fiction, the book described how Arthur was conceived at Tintagel, with the help of Merlin’s enchantments. Ever since, tales of the legendary king and his wizard have swirled around the atmospheric landscape. And today, when the tides allow, visitors can explore Merlin’s Cave on the beach below the castle.

The medieval castle

Geoffrey’s chronicles united history and magic, kindling the fire for the Arthurian legends we know and love. The stories thrilled people across medieval Britain – one of whom was the brother of King Henry III. Around 1233, Richard, Earl of Cornwall eagerly exchanged three of his manors to buy the ‘the island of Tyntagel’ and set about building his castle here.
Set on a precipice along the rocky coast, it was not an easy place to build a castle. The atmospheric fortress stood partly on the mainland and (...)

L O C A T I O N S Isle of Skye Scotland
•
Fary Glen
•
This dramatic landscape hidden on the Isle of Skye looks as though you've stepped into the magical realm⁣
The Fairy Glen is one of the Isle of Skye’s most enchanting attractions. The bumpy, off-the-beaten-path spot stands out from the surrounding farmland. The natural rock formations, cone-shaped hills dotted with ponds and scattered waterfalls, are all within one small area, making it seem as though it’s the shrunken version of a large-scale geological wonder.⁣
Though there’s no definitive folklore linking the land to the magical realm, some say faeries created the dramatic landscape and still dwell within its many crevices.

🌎 Tag someone to visit Shanghai with! 📸 by @youknowcyc📌Shanghai, Hu for short, is a renowned international metropolis drawing more and more attention from all over the world. Situated on the estuary of Yangtze River, it serves as the most influential economic, financial, international trade, and cultural center in East China. Also it is a popular travel destination for visitors to sense the pulsating development of the country. In addition to its modernisation, the city's multicultural flair endows it with a unique glamour. Here, one finds the perfect blend of cultures, the modern and the traditional , and the western and the oriental.
New skyscrapers and old Shikumen together draw the skyline of the city. Western customs and Chinese traditions intertwined and formed the city's culture, making a visitor's stay memorable. (©️www.travelchinaguide.com)

Porto Flavia ❤ Sardinia Italy 
Congrats @valentinoselis 
Use #map_of_Italy #map_of_europe

Porto Flavia is a sea harbor located near Nebida in the Iglesias comune of Italy. Built in 1923–24, it served as the mineral production hub of Masua in the west coast of the Sardinian Iglesiente area. It is named after Flavia Vecelli, the daughter of Cesare Vecelli, who engineered and designed the harbor. Wikipedia

CK6qKcKLmMH:
🔵Whitby Abbey🔵
⚫The 7th-century Christian monastery was situated on the East Cliff above Whitby in North Yorkshire, England.
⚫The ruins of the abbey have been used by sailors as a landmark at the headland.
🧛‍♂️The famous author" Bram Stoker "got the inspiration for his epic novel "Dracula" from the colossal remains of Whitby Abbey.
👻There is also a legend about a pale ghost of a lady who wanders in the shadowy ruins of the monastery.
😨The legend says that the lady was bricked up alive in one of the walls and that she was frequently seen in one of the crumbled windows.
⚫Since the 20th century, the substantial ruins of the church have been declared a Grade I Listed building and are in the care of English Heritage;the site museum is housed in Cholmley House.

🧛‍♂️ Follow me @ancient.scientist and check out many posts about our world's ancient history😉

Slovenia is a hiking paradise and needs to be the next stop on your hiking vacation travels. In a country the size of Massachusetts, there are over 6,000 miles of hiking trails. The trails range from dirt roads and paths in the highland to well-crafted marked mountain trails in the most rugged mountainous regions. Trails lead from the depths of the valleys, past mountain huts and on to the summits of the Julian Alps. Who would you hike here with?⁣
⁣

🏰 𝐂𝐎𝐋𝐎𝐌𝐀𝐑𝐄𝐒 🇪🇸

🇫🇷 Situé à Benalmadena (Sud de l'Espagne), ce château a été construit à la fin du XXème siècle par le docteur Esteban Martín, accompagné de deux maçons.

En utilisant plusieurs matériaux tels que la pierre, la brique ou encore le bois, le monument nous raconte l'histoire de la découverte du continent américain à travers différentes scènes.

Un hommage à Christophe Colomb.

Qu’en pensez-vous? 🧐

🇬🇧 Located in Benalmadena (South of Spain), this castle was built at the end of the 20th century by Doctor Esteban Martín, accompanied by two masons.

Using several materials such as stone, brick or even wood, the monument tells us the story of the discovery of the American continent through different scenes.

A tribute to Christopher Columbus.

What do you think about it ? 🧐

📸 @rutaideal 👌

The vast Inle Lake is located in the Shan Mountains in central Burma. Near its southern tip, the multi-tiered Phaung Daw U pagoda is home to golden statues. In the hills that rise near the village of Indein, the stupas of the Shwe Indein pagoda look like a field of golden arrows. Not far away, the forest has taken over the stupas of Nyaung Ohak. At the northern end of the lake, a wooden bridge connects the floating village of Maing Thauk to the shore. 

"Fishermen of İnle lake "
Those images look like a painting, right ?

CIqkKSToZmz:
Taining Danxia Hanging Temple, Fujian
Fujian is a province on the southeast coast of China, across from Taiwan. Most of the province is governed by the People’s Republic of China, but some Fujianese islands, namely Kinmen and Matsu, are controlled by the Republic of China (Taiwan). It is one of the largest tea-producing provinces in China, as well as one of the country’s most affluent. Like most Chinese provinces, Fujian is made up of primarily Han Chinese; however, uniquely to Fujian and the surrounding areas, many of the Han residents identify as Hakka, a culturally distinct group of Han Chinese.
These temples are named because they seem to hang in the Taning Danxia landform on Dajingu Lake, Fujian province.

Rocca Calascio è una rocca situata in Abruzzo, in provincia dell'Aquila, nel territorio di Calascio, ad un'altitudine di 1 460 m s.l.m.
Di origine medievale, è conosciuta per la presenza del castello, tra i più elevati d'Italia, considerato uno dei simboli dell'Abruzzo. La rocca, baricentrica tra l'altopiano di Campo Imperatore e quelli sottostanti di Navelli e del Tirino, è inserita in un contesto di grande valore paesaggistico e ricompresa nel Parco Nazionale del Gran Sasso e Monti della Laga di cui costituisce una delle principali mete turistiche.

The Italian Dolomites may not have the height and grandeur of the snow-covered French peaks or cute villages and steep-sided valleys of the Swiss Alps. But what sets the Dolomites apart are the dramatic limestone peaks. Crags that soar out of rolling green meadows. A landscape different from other alpine areas – where the change from rural idyll to inhospitable mountain is swift and stunning. Who would you take a hike here with? ⁣
⁣
📌 The Dolomites, Italy 🇮🇹⁣

CITtljvI4J7:
An extremely steep portion of the Great wall of China !

Apparently, many sections of the Great Wall are left abandoned, and so they turn out like in this video.

When added up, the sections of the Great Wall reach approximately a whopping 6,400 km, which is more than twice the diameter of Pluto. The wall is also longer than the diameter of Earth’s moon, which is about 3,480 km.

Did you know that camping is allowed on certain sections of the Great Wall ?
Several travel agencies offer overnight camping trips to the Great Wall, where lucky travelers can pitch tents on living history and watch the sun rise over one of the greatest feats of architecture in the world.

Who'd like to camp there ?

CIRIwMWIzoa:
A few things you could do while in Cappadocia:

- Explore Cappadocia’s most important historical points. The Göreme National Park is a UNESCO World Heritage Site, and you can spend the day exploring the fairy rock chimneys and rock formations as well as the beautiful churches and homes carved right into the rocks. These cave dwellings date back to the Roman era and were inhabited by Christians who retreated from the Roman Empire. The Tokalı and Elmalı Kilise (Church of the Buckle and Apple Church) are some of the most richly decorated, and you should definitely see the beautiful frescoes that continue to stun visitors to this day.

- Another important sight is the underground cities, which were used by the Christians in the Byzantine era for protection against Muslim Arabs during the Arab-Byzantine wars.

- Another essential experience: the hot air balloon tour. Look out over the whole mystifying landscape and make sure to bring a camera along!

#discoverturkey🇹🇷 with @lenore.cappadocia

Iceland, a Nordic island nation, is defined by its dramatic landscape with volcanoes, geysers, hot springs and lava fields. Massive glaciers are protected in Vatnajökull and Snæfellsjökull national parks. Most of the population lives in the capital, Reykjavik, which runs on geothermal power and is home to the National and Saga museums, tracing Iceland’s Viking history.

CIOIgI_IKET:
Mount Fuji’s distinctive, perfectly symmetrical peak has long captured the imagination of poets, painters and climbers alike. Scaling its lofty heights might seem daunting, but it’s possible for even inexperienced hikers to tick it off their bucket list. 

At 3,776 metres (12,388ft), Mount Fuji is Japan’s tallest mountain, and casts an awe-inspiring figure on the horizon that’s visible for miles around. There’s no need to restrict yourself to admiring its beauty from a distance, however. The ease of access, well-maintained and signposted trails, and lack of technical sections put the summit well within the reach of almost all aspiring climbers. To the top you'll be able to see Japan’s most magnificent sunrise.

Have you ever climbed Mount Fuji 🏔 ?

This is Mangystau, Kazakhstan.
Varied landscapes and desert lands are included in the territory of Mangystau: Caspian lowlands, plateaus (Usturt, Mangyshlak, Kendirli-Kayasan), mountains (Aktau, Karatau), cavities, desert, mountains, and ridges of mountains. An initial multigraded labyrinth, painted with green, yellow, pink and red loam sediments, shapes this kind of landscape.

I wish my photographs could showcase that same feeling I had of isolation and peace.

CGaiVQvBp5t:
.
📍l Colline del Chianti
🗺️l Toscana
📸l Scatto di @stefanotermanini
🏷️l Le Colline del Chianti (note anche come Monti del Chianti o più semplicemente Chianti) sono una breve catena montuosa (circa 20 km) a cavallo fra le province di Siena, Firenze e Arezzo che segnano il confine orientale della regione del Chianti con il Valdarno e la val di Chiana. La vetta più alta è quella di Monte San Michele (893 metri s.l.m.) nel comune di Greve in Chianti in provincia di Firenze. Le colline del chianti sono famose per i vigneti dai quali si ottiene un vino noto in tutto il mondo. Il rimanente territorio risulta invece prevalentemente collinare e i comuni presenti in questa area costituiscono parte della zona di produzione del Chianti, vino rosso DOCG.
#exploring_ita

""Perseids over the Bohemian Forest" 🌌 Did you see the shooting stars last week? Thanks to the amazing weather conditions without the moon, I witnessed over 70 meteors in just a few hours. This photograph features the brightest Perseids I was able to capture overnight on August 12-13, when The Perseid Meteor Shower peaks. The composite image was taken from Březník on the northern edge of the Luzenské valley in Šumava National Park. The whole location is in the middle of wild forests and is one of the darkest places in the Czech Republic. The night sky includes the central arch of our Milky Way Galaxy and the planets Saturn and Jupiter on the left side of the Milky Way. Make a wish! ✨"
🇨🇿 #discoverczechrepublic with @tomashavel 
#czecia #star #shootingstars #meteorshower
